package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for bindquery_into_map_any_hot_endpoint: Gin handlers that bind query parameters into map[string]any or map[string]interface{} on hot request paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule308NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule308NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule308NegativeRecord) (Rule308NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario308Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule308NegativeService, input Rule308NegativeRecord) (Rule308NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule308NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
